TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan == misagiki,sapitanged tu wawa nu alubu "suw ling nang" kakilimn misagiki,sapitanged tu wawa nu alubu "suw ling nang" i kasumamadan a mihcaan enemayb a bulad sabaw walu a demiad, Deng Zeu a kakitaan a wawaan tu tatayna mikadabu ci Siye Siyang Ling. ya kelakela' i tepan nu zazan malikeluh tu ni kasangsang nu udad, i dabek "Cun Cyu Teng" a dabek mikisasa' tu udad,ayza satu mitupin tu pakuyucay a tademaw ci "Caw Suw Cen", u zumaay a kelakela' a tayzatu mikisasa' tu udad i dabek, == nilaculan ==
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == misagiki,sapitaŇč…ôd tu wawa nu ar~…ĺubu "suw r~…ĺiŇč naŇč" kakir~…ĺimn misagiki,sapitaŇč…ôd tu wawa nu ar~…ĺubu "suw r~…ĺiŇč naŇč" i kasumamadan a mińß ¶aan …ôn…ômajb a bur~…ĺad sabaw war~…ĺu a d…ômiad, d…ôŇč z…ôu a kakitaan a wawaan tu tatajna mikadabu ¶i sij…ô sijaŇč r~…ĺiŇč. ja k…ôr~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° i t…ôpan nu zazan mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu ni kasaŇčsaŇč nu udad, i dab…ôk " ¶un ¶ju t…ôŇč" a dab…ôk mikisasa Ē~ ° tu udad,ajza satu mitupin tu pakuju ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i " ¶aw suw ¶…ôn", u zumaaj a k…ôr~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° a tajzatu mikisasa Ē~ ° tu udad i dab…ôk, == nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ==
S.FORM: == tatangahan == misagiki,sapitanged tu wawa nu alubu "suw ling nang" kakilimn misagiki,sapitanged tu wawa nu alubu "suw ling nang" i kasumamadan a mihcaan enemayb a bulad sabaw walu a demiad, Deng Zeu a kakitaan a wawaan tu tatayna mikadabu ci Siye Siyang Ling. ya kelakela' i tepan nu zazan malikeluh tu ni kasangsang nu udad, i dabek "Cun Cyu Teng" a dabek mikisasa' tu udad,ayza satu mitupin tu pakuyucay a tademaw ci "Caw Suw Cen", u zumaay a kelakela' a tayzatu mikisasa' tu udad i dabek, == nilaculan ==
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == misagiki,sapitaŇč…ôd tu wawa nu ar~…ĺubu "suw r~…ĺiŇč naŇč" kakir~…ĺimn misagiki,sapitaŇč…ôd tu wawa nu ar~…ĺubu "suw r~…ĺiŇč naŇč" i kasumamadan a mińß ¶aan …ôn…ômajb a bur~…ĺad sabaw war~…ĺu a d…ômiad, d…ôŇč z…ôu a kakitaan a wawaan tu tatajna mikadabu ¶i sij…ô sijaŇč r~…ĺiŇč. ja k…ôr~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° i t…ôpan nu zazan mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu ni kasaŇčsaŇč nu udad, i dab…ôk " ¶un ¶ju t…ôŇč" a dab…ôk mikisasa Ē~ ° tu udad,ajza satu mitupin tu pakuju ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i " ¶aw suw ¶…ôn", u zumaaj a k…ôr~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° a tajzatu mikisasa Ē~ ° tu udad i dab…ôk, == nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ==
